title: write_range
description: Write values to a range in a Google Sheets spreadsheet or Excel file. Supports overwriting, appending rows, and inserting with shift.

spreadsheet_id.description: Spreadsheet ID (Google Sheets) or file path (Excel)

values.description: 2D array of values to write (rows × columns)

mode.description: Write mode: overwrite range, append after last row, or insert shifting existing data

value_input.description: raw: values stored as-is; user_entered: parsed as if typed (formulas evaluated)

include_headers.description: First row of values contains headers
